target_market_label.zh: 阿塞拜疆（AZSTAND / 国家电网）
target_market_label.zht: 亞塞拜疆（AZSTAND / 國家電網）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入阿塞拜疆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入亞塞拜疆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Azerbaijan AZSTAND / AZS conformity, IEC-derived BESS safety standards, Azerenerji / Azerishig grid connection, fire-safety approval, 220/380 V 50 Hz settings, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与阿塞拜疆AZSTAND / AZS合格评定、IEC衍生BESS安全标准、Azerenerji / Azerishig并网、消防安全批准、220/380V 50Hz参数及UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與亞塞拜疆AZSTAND / AZS合格評定、IEC衍生BESS安全標準、Azerenerji / Azerishig併網、消防安全批准、220/380V 50Hz參數及UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Azerbaijan AZSTAND conformity determination, customs determination, fire-safety approval, Azerenerji / Azerishig grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member; EAC documents may be useful background evidence but do not by themselves replace the Azerbaijan domestic conformity route. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Azerbaijan, AZSTAND, grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、阿塞拜疆AZSTAND合格评定裁定、海关裁定、消防安全批准、Azerenerji / Azerishig并网批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员；EAC文件可作为背景证据，但本身不能替代阿塞拜疆国内合格评定路径。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿塞拜疆、AZSTAND、电网、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、亞塞拜疆AZSTAND合格評定裁定、海關裁定、消防安全批准、Azerenerji / Azerishig併網批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。亞塞拜疆不是EAEU成員；EAC文件可作為背景證據，但本身不能替代亞塞拜疆國內合格評定路徑。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行亞塞拜疆、AZSTAND、電網、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Azerbaijan, the common first gap is domestic Azerbaijan conformity through AZSTAND / AZS national standards and mandatory conformity documentation where in scope, not EAEU EAC certification. Follow-on gaps are IEC-based battery and system safety evidence, Azerenerji or Azerishig grid-connection review, fire-authority approval for the installation, 220/380 V 50 Hz settings, and UN 38.3 transport documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿塞拜疆时，常见首要差距是在适用范围内按阿塞拜疆国内AZSTAND / AZS国家标准和强制性合格评定文件处理，而不是EAEU EAC认证。随后还需满足IEC体系电池及系统安全证据、Azerenerji或Azerishig并网审查、安装消防主管机关批准、220/380V 50Hz参数以及UN 38.3运输文件要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口亞塞拜疆時，常見首要差距是在適用範圍內按亞塞拜疆國內AZSTAND / AZS國家標準和強制性合格評定文件處理，而不是EAEU EAC認證。隨後還需滿足IEC體系電池及系統安全證據、Azerenerji或Azerishig併網審查、安裝消防主管機關批准、220/380V 50Hz參數以及UN 38.3運輸文件要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
